/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/gravitysim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gravitysim.dir/src/CelestialBody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gravitysim.dir/src/GravitySimulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gravitysim.dir/src/Scenarios.cpp.o -o gravitysim  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
